title: Cross-Mac MQTT connection runbook for shared realtime board
description: Write exact config/env steps for a second Mac to attach kbsc/kbs to same AWS MQTT tenant topic and observe synchronized updates.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Progress: Starting cross-Mac MQTT runbook authoring with tested host/container parameters. Evidence: local broker and cloud token paths exercised; topic/env contract confirmed. Next: add docs section with exact second-Mac steps and verification commands. Risk/Blocker: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Progress: Cross-Mac MQTT operator runbook added with tenant creation, Cognito claims, token lifecycle, and two-Mac verification commands. Evidence: docs/CLOUD_CONSOLE_RUNTIME.md Operator Runbook section + infra/cloud/README.md cross-reference. Next: close task and close epic after final status summary. Risk/Blocker: none.
